dialogos.texto_en: Hum hum, hum hummm ♪
The temperature of the water is good.\nPrep for the tea press and tea cups are also good.\nThe cream puffs turned out well, now all that's left%p-2;――
Oh?
Yo, I'm here.
Futaro!\nWelcome!
Long time no see, Nino.
You're early.\nI didn't hear the intercom ringing...\nHow did you open the front door with the auto lock?
Oh, I happened to meet Itsuki and the others downstairs.\nThey let me in as they left.
They all seemed\nto be going somewhere together...
Yeah, they said they're going out to a movie and shopping.\nThey're planning to have dinner out there too.
Thanks to that,\nit's just the two of us today, you and I.
You...\nYou didn't happen to kick them out \nbecause I was coming, did you?
No, it's not like that.\nYou and I promised to spend this holiday together,\ndidn't we?
Since they knew about that, \nthey took care of all that on their own.
It's been a while since you came back home,\nso they wanted us to have some time alone.
I see.\nI feel like I did something wrong.
But I guess you guys are still the same.
Yes.\nDon't worry, we'll be fine here.
Speaking of which, Futaro.\nHow's university going? Isn't it tough living alone?
Well, it's going alright.\nI'm finally getting used to living by myself.
...You haven't made any weird friends\nover there, have you?
No need to worry.\nI have too much to do,\nso I don't have that kind of spare time.
Really?\nWhat about female friends...
You guys alone are enough trouble.
Hmm, you say it's troublesome.\nBut you seem happy about it, don't you?
...Well,\nit's been a while since I saw you, after all.
Heheh!\nWell then, I have to provide you\nwith plenty of hospitality today.
I just finished preparing the tea.\nCome on over here!
Alright.
Teehee.\nI put extra effort into making it for you, Futaro.\nTake your time and enjoy it.
Hey...\nNino, aren't you a bit too close?
Not at all. \nWe're lovers, so it's normal to be this close. Totally normal.
But still.\nIt's kinda difficult to move like this.
But it's been a while since we've seen each other.\nWhile we have this chance, I want to fully charge up\nmy Futaro-meter.
What do you mean, 'Futaro-meter'?
You say I'm too close, but deep down, \nyou're enjoying it, right?
Well, it's not like I dislike it.\nBut what if those guys come back?
You don't have to worry about that.\nIf you're concerned about it, we can go to my room.
W-well...
Oh my.\nCome on, Futaro,\nyou get embarrassed so easily.
...I'm still not used to being called by my name.\nTake it easy on me, will you?
What are you going on about?
We finally have time alone together, don't we?\n...If that's the case,\nlet's do something even more amazing, hm?
H-hey, Nino...
I don't mind, you know?\nBecause%p-2;――
You and I are lovers, Futaro.
Well, that's true, but...
N-Nino...
A-actually, no!\nIt's just too soon!
*sigh*\nI can't believe you brought it up, and then...
...We have limited time to be together, you know?\nI got a little carried away with my feelings.
Well, I can understand your feelings too, you know?\nIt's different from our high school days.\nIt's not easy for us to meet up anymore.
The next opportunity won't be for quite a while.
That's true...
In that case!\nI also need to charge up\nmy Nino-o-meter, while I have this chance!
...Huh?
So, I won't just leave without anything happening.
W-wait, Futaro%p-2;――\n%p;Eeeep?!
...Don't react like that.\nIt's embarrassing for me too.
But, with you taking initiative like that...
I'm always at the receiving end from you.\nIsn't it okay once in a while?
Well then, I'll charge up\nuntil you finish drinking.\nAnd then%p-2;――
I'll prepare another cup of tea for you.
Huh?\nI haven't finished drinking yet.\nHow many cups are you planning to make me drink?
It doesn't matter how many cups.\nI also want to...\ncharge you up, Futaro.
So, I'll be by your side, forever...
